nodes.text: Date of birth? Sure — June 14th, 1966. It's on the card.

responses.text: The date on file doesn't match.

nodes.text: What? That's my birthday — June 14th, 1966. Is there a typo somewhere? The urgent care filled in the paperwork themselves.

responses.text: You're right, I misread. It matches.

nodes.text: Okay, good. Anything else or are we good?
